reviews.reviewComments: all ready payment but last minute cannot check in

reviews.reviewPositives: Dekat dgn town. Owner baik, membantu saat kita dlm kesukaran cari jalan ke homestay.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Jalan agak sempit, waze tidak dpt locate exact place, makanya kami sesat berpusing hampir 7x mencari homestay. 
Hot shower tiada. 
Towel mandi tidak disediakan tapi setelah kami mohon, owner terus belikan kami towel mandi.
